description_long: This is a soft-sided, rectangular duffel-style briefcase with a predominantly red fabric body and black accents. It features two parallel black fabric handles attached to the top, as well as a longer, adjustable shoulder strap for carrying convenience. The front side displays a small rectangular brand logo patch and two external zippered pockets for additional storage. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper that runs along the top edge, and the bag's structure is reinforced with black fabric bands. The sides are rounded, and the base appears flat and sturdy, suitable for placing on the ground. The overall design is practical and sporty, ideal for urban commuting or gym use.
description: A red and black soft-sided duffel-style briefcase with dual handles, a shoulder strap, and external zippered pockets. The design is sporty and functional, featuring a visible brand logo patch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red body, black handles, shoulder strap, two external zippered pockets, and a visible brand logo patch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded black end, the attachment of the shoulder strap, and the thickness of the bag.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red back panel with black reinforcement bands and no external pockets or logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the rounded end and strap attachment, with no visible pockets.
attribute_handle_type: Two parallel flexible black fabric handles attached with reinforced stitching, plus one adjustable, flexible shoulder strap attached with metal/plastic hardware.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top; no visible lock mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular brand logo patch is visible on the front side, centered between the handles.
attribute_external_pockets: Two external zippered pockets on the front side, medium-sized, horizontally oriented.
